---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
toc-location: left
---

## Cory Dugan, PhD

```{=html}
<div class="cv-header">
  <div>
    <div class="cv-subtitle"><strong>Postdoctoral Research Fellow</strong> · Pennington Biomedical Research Centre</div>
    <div class="cv-subtitle">Iron regulation · Women's health · Clinical trials · Biostatistics</div>
    <div class="cv-links">
      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/cory-dugan-phd/">LinkedIn</a> · <a href="mailto:cory.dugan1@gmail.com">Email</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

## Education

```{=html}
<div class="cv-card-grid">
  <div class="cv-card">
    <h4>Doctor of Philosophy</h4>
    <p class="cv-org">University of Western Australia</p>
    <p class="cv-date">2020–2024 · Nutrition & Exercise Physiology</p>
    <p class="cv-detail">Iron and women's health: A multidimensional exploration of iron deficiency, management, and treatment in active females</p>
  </div>
  <div class="cv-card">
    <h4>BSc (First Class Honours)</h4>
    <p class="cv-org">University of Western Australia</p>
    <p class="cv-date">2018–2019 · Bioenergetics</p>
    <p class="cv-detail">Altitude & blood glucose in T1D. Altmetric 395 (top 5%)</p>
  </div>
  <div class="cv-card">
    <h4>Bachelor of Science</h4>
    <p class="cv-org">University of Western Australia</p>
    <p class="cv-date">2018–2019 · Sport & Exercise Science</p>
    <p class="cv-detail">WAM 88.25 · GPA 7.0 · Frank Pyke Scholarship</p>
  </div>
  <div class="cv-card">
    <h4>AFHEA</h4>
    <p class="cv-org">Advance HE</p>
    <p class="cv-date">2022 · Higher Education</p>
    <p class="cv-detail">Associate Fellowship — UK Professional Standards Framework</p>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

## Professional Experience

```{=html}
<table class="cv-exp-table">
  <thead>
    <tr><th>Role</th><th>Organisation</th><th>Years</th></tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr><td><strong>Postdoctoral Research Fellow</strong></td><td>Pennington Biomedical Research Centre</td><td>2025–Present</td></tr>
    <tr><td><strong>Founder</strong></td><td>HolisticHer</td><td>2024–Present</td></tr>
    <tr><td><strong>Director</strong></td><td>P∆R∆DOX Health & Wellbeing</td><td>2024–Present</td></tr>
    <tr><td><strong>Adjunct Research Fellow</strong></td><td>Curtin University</td><td>2024–Present</td></tr>
    <tr><td><strong>Research Fellow</strong></td><td>Monash University</td><td>2024</td></tr>
    <tr><td><strong>Research Officer (CI)</strong></td><td>University of Western Australia</td><td>2023–Present</td></tr>
    <tr><td><strong>Associate Lecturer</strong></td><td>University of Western Australia</td><td>2022–2024</td></tr>
    <tr><td><strong>Coordinating Physiologist</strong></td><td>UWA Exercise & Performance Centre</td><td>2022–2024</td></tr>
    <tr><td><strong>Academic Tutor & Lab Demonstrator</strong></td><td>University of Western Australia</td><td>2021–2024</td></tr>
    <tr><td><strong>Head S&C Coach</strong></td><td>DDFUA</td><td>2020–2023</td></tr>
    <tr><td>Umpire</td><td>AFL (AFLW inaugural season)</td><td>2017</td></tr>
    <tr><td>Personal Trainer</td><td>QV1</td><td>2017–2022</td></tr>
    <tr><td>Research Assistant</td><td>University of Western Australia</td><td>2016–2017</td></tr>
    <tr><td>Tournament Director</td><td>Australian Poker League</td><td>2015–2017</td></tr>
    <tr><td>Umpire</td><td>WAFL</td><td>2015–2024</td></tr>
    <tr><td>Croupier</td><td>Crown</td><td>2014–2015</td></tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

---

## Teaching

```{=html}
<table class="cv-exp-table">
  <thead>
    <tr><th>Unit</th><th>School</th><th>Role</th><th>Years</th></tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr><td>Applied Professional Business Communications (BUSN5100)</td><td>UWA Business</td><td>Tutor & Lecturer</td><td>2023–2025</td></tr>
    <tr><td>Musculoskeletal System & Movement (SSEH1101)</td><td>UWA Human Sciences</td><td>Lab Demonstrator</td><td>2021–2024</td></tr>
    <tr><td>Exercise Physiology (SSEH2260)</td><td>UWA Human Sciences</td><td>Tutor & Lecturer</td><td>2021–2024</td></tr>
    <tr><td>Bioenergetics (SSEH3366)</td><td>UWA Human Sciences</td><td>Tutor & Lecturer</td><td>2021–2024</td></tr>
    <tr><td>Issues in Women's Health Research (IMED3301)</td><td>UWA IMED</td><td>Tutor & Lecturer</td><td>2021–2024</td></tr>
    <tr><td>Health and Fitness (SSEH1103)</td><td>UWA Human Sciences</td><td>Coordinator</td><td>2021–2024</td></tr>
    <tr><td>Sport Physiology (SSEH3365)</td><td>UWA Human Sciences</td><td>Tutor & Lecturer</td><td>2021–2024</td></tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

---

## Supervision

```{=html}
<div class="cv-card-grid">
  <div class="cv-card">
    <h4>Ms. Kanon Uchiyama</h4>
    <p class="cv-date">Masters · 2022–Present · Secondary Supervisor</p>
    <p class="cv-detail">Rest break frequency and performance in mining simulations</p>
  </div>
  <div class="cv-card">
    <h4>Mr. Samuel Kell</h4>
    <p class="cv-date">Masters · 2023–Present · Secondary Supervisor</p>
    <p class="cv-detail">Appetite suppression and oxidative stress after maximal sprint effort</p>
  </div>
  <div class="cv-card">
    <h4>Ms. Caitlin Atwell</h4>
    <p class="cv-date">Honours · 2023–Present · Secondary Supervisor</p>
    <p class="cv-detail">Dietary iron and the elite dancer</p>
  </div>
  <div class="cv-card">
    <h4>Mr. Arjan Ruba</h4>
    <p class="cv-date">Masters · 2024–Present · Secondary Supervisor</p>
    <p class="cv-detail">Hydration's impact on hypoglycaemia in T1D during exercise</p>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

## Honours & Awards

```{=html}
<table class="cv-exp-table">
  <thead>
    <tr><th>Award</th><th>Year</th><th>Type</th><th>Amount</th></tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr><td>Pharmacosmos RCT Grant</td><td>2019</td><td>Grant</td><td>$555,460</td></tr>
    <tr><td>Australian Government RTP Scholarship + Stipend</td><td>2020</td><td>Scholarship</td><td>$190,500</td></tr>
    <tr><td>NHMRC Investigator Grant: DARP</td><td>2023</td><td>Grant</td><td>$60,000</td></tr>
    <tr><td>Pharmacosmos PhD Top Up Scholarship</td><td>2019</td><td>Scholarship</td><td>$30,000</td></tr>
    <tr><td>Telethon Kids Institute Seeding Grant</td><td>2019</td><td>Grant</td><td>$17,000</td></tr>
    <tr><td>BJSM PhD Academy Award</td><td>2024</td><td>Award</td><td></td></tr>
    <tr><td>Wiley Top Downloaded Article (Transfusion)</td><td>2025</td><td>Prize</td><td></td></tr>
    <tr><td>Wiley Top Downloaded Article (Anaesthesia)</td><td>2021</td><td>Prize</td><td></td></tr>
    <tr><td>NATA Travel Grant</td><td>2023</td><td>Grant</td><td>$5,000</td></tr>
    <tr><td>Editors Choice: Transfusion Evidence Library</td><td>2023</td><td>Prize</td><td></td></tr>
    <tr><td>UWA Teaching Excellence (Early Career)</td><td>2023</td><td>Award</td><td></td></tr>
    <tr><td>NATA Best Poster - Oral Communications</td><td>2021</td><td>Prize</td><td></td></tr>
    <tr><td>NATA Presentation Prize</td><td>2021</td><td>Prize</td><td></td></tr>
    <tr><td>Frank Pyke Memorial Scholarship</td><td>2018</td><td>Scholarship</td><td>$5,000</td></tr>
    <tr><td>NHMRC CRE T1D Honours Scholarship</td><td>2018</td><td>Scholarship</td><td>$5,000</td></tr>
    <tr><td>UWA Ethics Application of the Year</td><td>2018</td><td>Honour</td><td>$5,000</td></tr>
    <tr><td>Aus.Iron Travel Grant</td><td>2022</td><td>Grant</td><td>$2,000</td></tr>
    <tr><td>Telethon Kids Travel Grant</td><td>2020</td><td>Grant</td><td>$3,000</td></tr>
    <tr><td>Associate Fellowship AFHEA</td><td>2022</td><td>Award</td><td></td></tr>
    <tr><td>Life Membership — DDFUA</td><td>2019</td><td>Prize</td><td></td></tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

---

## Certifications

```{=html}
<div class="cv-chip-row">
  <span class="cv-chip">Mental Health First Aider (2024)</span>
  <span class="cv-chip">R—Data Use in Science, HD (2022)</span>
  <span class="cv-chip">Statistics in R (2021)</span>
  <span class="cv-chip">Intro to R & Statistics (2021)</span>
  <span class="cv-chip">Meta-analysis Statistics (2020)</span>
  <span class="cv-chip">Cochrane Systematic Review (2020)</span>
  <span class="cv-chip">Systematic Literature Review (2020)</span>
  <span class="cv-chip">Good Clinical Practice (2019)</span>
  <span class="cv-chip">Pragmatic RCTs (2019)</span>
  <span class="cv-chip">First Aid CPR & AED (2017)</span>
  <span class="cv-chip">Certificate IV Fitness (2017)</span>
  <span class="cv-chip">Certificate III Fitness (2017)</span>
  <span class="cv-chip">Casino Gaming License (2015)</span>
  <span class="cv-chip">RSA (2014)</span>
  <span class="cv-chip">RSG (2014)</span>
</div>
```

---

## Publications

1. MacLean, B., Lim, J., Fuller, J., et al. & **Dugan, C.** (2025). Community screening for iron deficiency in reproductive aged women. *Vox Sanguinis, 120*(1), 22-31.

2. **Dugan, C.**, Scott, C., Abeysiri, S., et al. (2021). The need to screen for anemia in exercising women. *Medicine, 100*(39), e27271.

3. **Dugan, C.**, Cabolis, K., Miles, L. F., & Richards, T. (2022). Systematic review and meta-analysis of IV iron therapy for adults with non-anaemic iron deficiency. *J Cachexia Sarcopenia Muscle, 13*(6), 2637-2649.

4. MacLean, B., Fuller, J., Lim, J., **Dugan, C.**, & Richards, T. (2025). Greater prevalence of anaemia and heavy menstrual bleeding... *British J Haematology, 206*(5), 1479-84. (Pre-Print)

5. **Dugan, C.** (2024). Iron and women's health [Doctoral Dissertation]. UWA Research Repository.

6. Attwell, C., **Dugan, C.**, McKay, A. K., et al. (2022). Dietary iron and the elite dancer. *Nutrients, 14*(9), 1936.

7. Attwell, C., McKay, A., Sim, M., **Dugan, C.**, et al. (2023). Timing is everything... iron supplementation in ballet dancers. *European J Sport Science, 23*(12), 2275-2282.

8. Lim, J., MacLean, B., **Dugan, C.**, et al. (2024). TikTok videos on iron deficiency. *Healthcare*. (Under Review)

9. **Dugan, C.**, Peeling, P., Burden, R., & Richards, T. (2024). Efficacy of iron supplementation on physical capacity: Protocol for an IPD meta-analysis. *Systematic Reviews, 13*(1), 182.

10. **Dugan, C.**, & Hensen, W. (2025). Ironing out iron deficiency in female athletes. *Sports Injury Bulletin, 22*(1).

11. **Dugan, C.**, MacLean, B., Cabolis, K., et al. (2021). The misogyny of iron deficiency. *Anaesthesia, 76*, 56-62.

12. **Dugan, C.**, & Hennigar, S. (2025). Carbon monoxide inhalation to increase haemoglobin mass. *BJSM, 59*(11), 749-750.

13. Clarke, L., Froessler, B., ..., **Dugan, C.**, et al. (2025). Iron optimisation in pregnancy. *Internal Medicine Journal, 55*(2), 300-307.

14. Uchiyama, K., King, J., Wallman, K., Taggart, S., **Dugan, C.**, & Girard, O. (2022). Rest break frequency and duration: a mining simulation study. *European J Applied Physiology, 122*(9), 2087-2097.

15. Peeling, P., McKay, A., McCormick, R., **Dugan, C.**, & Sim, M. (2022). Iron and the Athlete. *The Nutrition-Change*.

16. Abeysiri, S., **Dugan, C.**, Raobaikady, R., Richards, T., & Scott, C. (2021). The need to screen for anaemia in female populations. *J Science and Medicine in Sport*.

17. **Dugan, C.** (2024). Iron and women's health [PhD Academy Award]. *BJSM, 58*(23), 1466-1468.

18. Davies, A. T., Devlin, P. M., **Dugan, C.**, et al. (2023). Non-ESA non-iron therapies for anaemia: A scoping review. *Transfusion, 63*(4), 849-860.

19. **Dugan, C. W.**, et al. (2022). Effects of simulated high altitude on blood glucose during exercise in T1D. *JCEM, 107*(5), 1375-1382.

20. **Dugan, C.**, Peeling, P., et al. (2025). IRONWOMAN trial. *BJSM, 59*(13), 921-930.

21. **Dugan, C.**, Simpson, A., Peeling, P., et al. (2023). Perceived impact of iron deficiency in exercising females. *Patient Preference and Adherence, 17*, 2097-2108.

22. Richards, T., Wijaya, L. K., Lim, J., **Dugan, C.**, & Dahly, D. (2025). IV Iron-induced hypophosphatemia in surgical patients. *JAMA Network Open, 8*(4), e253093.

23. James, C., **Dugan, C. W.**, Boyd, C., et al. (2024). Temporal tracking of cysteine 34 oxidation. *European J Applied Physiology, 124*(9), 2639-2650.

24. **Dugan, C.**, Peeling, P., Davies, A., et al. (2024). Menorrhagia, iron deficiency, and anaemia in active females. *JSAMS, 27*(7), 437-450.

25. Devlin, P., Davies, A., **Dugan, C.**, et al. (2022). Non-ESA non-iron therapies protocol. *BMJ Open, 12*(4), e059059.

---

## Research Funding

**Total: ~$862,000 AUD**

```{=html}
<table class="cv-exp-table">
  <thead>
    <tr><th>Grant</th><th>Funder</th><th>Year</th><th>Amount (AUD)</th></tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr><td><strong>Pharmacosmos RCT Grant</strong></td><td>Pharmacosmos</td><td>2019</td><td>$550,000</td></tr>
    <tr><td><strong>RTP PhD Studentship</strong></td><td>UWA</td><td>2019</td><td>$180,000</td></tr>
    <tr><td><strong>NHMRC Investigator Grant DARP</strong></td><td>NHMRC</td><td>2023</td><td>$60,000</td></tr>
    <tr><td>Pharmacosmos PhD Top Up</td><td>Pharmacosmos</td><td>2019</td><td>$30,000</td></tr>
    <tr><td>Telethon Kids Seeding Grant</td><td>Telethon Kids</td><td>2019</td><td>$17,000</td></tr>
    <tr><td>NATA Travel Grant</td><td>NATA</td><td>2023</td><td>$5,000</td></tr>
    <tr><td>Frank Pyke Scholarship</td><td>UWA</td><td>2018</td><td>$5,000</td></tr>
    <tr><td>NHMRC CRE T1D Honours</td><td>NHMRC</td><td>2018</td><td>$5,000</td></tr>
    <tr><td>UWA Ethics Application of Year</td><td>UWA</td><td>2018</td><td>$5,000</td></tr>
    <tr><td>Telethon Kids Travel Grant</td><td>Telethon Kids</td><td>2019</td><td>$3,000</td></tr>
    <tr><td>Aus.Iron Travel Grant</td><td>Aus.Iron</td><td>2022</td><td>$2,000</td></tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

---

## Invited Presentations

```{=html}
<table class="cv-exp-table">
  <thead>
    <tr><th>Title</th><th>Venue</th><th>Year</th></tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr><td>Iron and women's health</td><td>Multiple venues</td><td>2024</td></tr>
    <tr><td>Women's health student research symposium</td><td>UWA</td><td>2024</td></tr>
    <tr><td>Issues in women's health guest lecture</td><td>UWA</td><td>2024</td></tr>
    <tr><td>Free iron deficiency screening — 10,000+ females</td><td>Community</td><td>2023</td></tr>
    <tr><td>Novel research in type 1 diabetes</td><td>T1D Family Centre</td><td>2021</td></tr>
    <tr><td>Guest lectures: exercise physiology & bioenergetics</td><td>UWA</td><td>2021–2024</td></tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

---

## Peer Review

```{=html}
<div class="cv-two-col">
  <div>
    <strong>Editorial Roles</strong><br>
    Academic Editor — PLOS One<br>
    Guest Editor — Women's Health
  </div>
  <div>
    <strong>Paid Reviewer</strong><br>
    Journal of Medical Economics (2025)<br>
    BMC Public Health (2025)
  </div>
</div>
<div class="cv-chip-row" style="margin-top:0.8rem;">
  <span class="cv-chip">BMJ</span>
  <span class="cv-chip">JAMA</span>
  <span class="cv-chip">BJSM</span>
  <span class="cv-chip">Scientific Reports</span>
  <span class="cv-chip">BJA</span>
  <span class="cv-chip">British J Surgery</span>
  <span class="cv-chip">British J Nutrition</span>
  <span class="cv-chip">JSAMS</span>
  <span class="cv-chip">JCSM</span>
  <span class="cv-chip">Vox Sanguinis</span>
  <span class="cv-chip">Internal Medicine J</span>
  <span class="cv-chip">JCEM</span>
  <span class="cv-chip">PLOS One</span>
  <span class="cv-chip">Women's Health</span>
</div>
```

---

## Media Engagement

50+ media appearances across outlets including:

```{=html}
<div class="cv-chip-row">
  <span class="cv-chip">ABC Radio</span>
  <span class="cv-chip">Sydney Morning Herald</span>
  <span class="cv-chip">Brisbane Times</span>
  <span class="cv-chip">The Age</span>
  <span class="cv-chip">Medical News Today</span>
  <span class="cv-chip">MSN</span>
  <span class="cv-chip">Healio</span>
  <span class="cv-chip">EurekAlert</span>
  <span class="cv-chip">US Pharmacist</span>
  <span class="cv-chip">Medpage Today</span>
  <span class="cv-chip">Sports Injury Bulletin</span>
  <span class="cv-chip">UWA News</span>
  <span class="cv-chip">Medical Life Sciences News</span>
  <span class="cv-chip">Times of India</span>
</div>
```

---

## Policy Citations

```{=html}
<div class="cv-card-grid">
  <div class="cv-card">
    <h4>WHO (2025)</h4>
    <p class="cv-detail">Guidance on implementing patient blood management. Cited the JCSM 2022 meta-analysis.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="cv-card">
    <h4>OSHA (2024)</h4>
    <p class="cv-detail">Heat Injury and Illness Prevention. Cited the EJAP 2022 mining study.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="cv-card">
    <h4>Public Health Ontario (2023)</h4>
    <p class="cv-detail">Interventions to Mitigate Heat-related Harms. Cited the EJAP 2022 study.</p>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

## Service & Engagement

```{=html}
<div class="cv-two-col">
  <div>
    <strong>Industry & Government</strong><br>
    <span style="font-size:0.85rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7);">
      Iron optimisation in pregnancy HOW Collaborative (2025)<br>
      PowerfulHer Podcast (2025)<br>
      The misogyny of iron deficiency consultancy (2020)
    </span>
  </div>
  <div>
    <strong>Community Engagement</strong><br>
    <span style="font-size:0.85rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7);">
      Free iron deficiency screening — 10,000+ females (2023)<br>
      Free anaemia screening (2021)<br>
      Every Woman Triathlon screening (2021)
    </span>
  </div>
</div>
<div class="cv-two-col" style="margin-top:1rem;">
  <div>
    <strong>Professional Networks & Online</strong><br>
    <span style="font-size:0.85rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7);">
      WANFLUA member (2015–Present)<br>
      DDFUA Life Member (2009–Present)<br>
      STRIVE mentor (2021)
    </span>
  </div>
  <div>
    <strong>Online Communities</strong><br>
    <span style="font-size:0.85rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7);">
      Iron Deficiency Anaemia Women's Group — 34,000+ members<br>
      Anaemia Education — 5,000+ members
    </span>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

## References

Available upon request
